identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, KPI values

primary.description: Zinc 900 - Used for primary actions, navigation, and strong text.

accent.description: Lime 500 - Used for status indicators, active tabs, and key highlights.

background.description: Slate 50 for app background, White for cards.

rules: Use Lime Green (#84CC16) ONLY for positive status, active states, or critical highlights.
Primary buttons should be Zinc 900 (Black/Dark Gray).
Cards must be White on a Slate 50 background.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.

cards.classes: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-lime-500/20 focus:border-lime-500 rounded-md

tables.style: Clean, no vertical borders. Header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider.

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-lg (0.5rem) for cards, rounded-md (0.375rem) for buttons/inputs.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200/50.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on Lime Green is readable (use Dark text on Lime, or White text on Dark Lime).
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (Zinc 900 as Primary, Lime 500 as Accent).
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar/Header structure.
Use 'Recharts' for the Executive Dashboard charts (Bar, Pie, Area).
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the Dashboard home.
Ensure the 'Inventory' table supports sorting and filtering.
Use 'Manrope' font from Google Fonts (import in index.css).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
